introSection: Mine Train Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Songjiang, Shanghai, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 28 riders per train.

fullText:
Mine Train Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Songjiang, Shanghai, China.



7 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 28 riders per train.
